Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0833 "BATTLETHROUGHTIME-07C3-0833" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07c3 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Battle Through Time.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $07C3 which copies a tiny code snippet back to $0200 where it was originally. It also sets $DD03 to $02 as was originally done during the loading routine of the game.
